ats_utilities.cli.config_manager module¶

Module

config_manager.py

Copyright

Info

Defines class ATSConfigManager with attribute(s) and method(s). Default implementation of IConfigManager that encapsulates factory logic.

class ats_utilities.cli.config_manager.ATSConfigManager(config2object: IRead | None = None, object2config: IWrite | None = None, options_parser: IATSOptionParser | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, strategy: IATSArgParseStrategy | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IConfigManager

Default implementation of IConfigManager that encapsulates factory logic.

It defines:

attributes:
__config2object - Object for converting configuration to object.
__object2config - Object for converting object to configuration.
__options_parser - Option parser for CLI arguments.
__checker - Checker for parameter validation.
__reporter - Reporter for console output.
__file_checker - Checker for file operations.
__strategy - Strategy for argument parsing.
methods:
load_config - Loads the appropriate configuration base based on file type.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
load_config(info_file: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → CfgBase | IniBase | JsonBase | XmlBase | YamlBase | None[source]¶

Loads the appropriate configuration base based on file type.

Parameters:

  • info_file (<Optional[str]>) – Path to information file.

  • verbose (<bool>) – Verbose flag.

Returns:

Configuration object.

Return type:

<Config>

Exceptions:

None
